RBI staff candidates meeting specific eligibility criteria are exempted from the fee entirely. | Bank and transaction charges are borne separately by the candidate, and the fee can be paid online via debit card, credit card, internet banking, IMPS, or mobile wallets. Once paid, the application fee is non-refundable under any circumstances and cannot be carried forward to a future selection process.

age_limit.details: The age limit for all three Site Engineer posts is a minimum of 40 years and a maximum of 65 years as on 01 June 2026. Candidates should note that no age relaxation is available for any category in this recruitment, including SC, ST, OBC, or EWS candidates.

selection_process: Candidates wondering about the RBI Site Engineer selection process can note that there is no written exam for this recruitment. Selection happens through preliminary screening by a Screening Committee
followed by document verification and a personal interview.
Screening & Shortlisting: The Screening Committee may enhance minimum qualification or experience criteria to limit the number of candidates called

in proportion to the number of vacancies. Merely meeting minimum eligibility does not guarantee an interview call. Interview Call Letter: Shortlisted candidates receive their call letter only via email from [email protected] — no postal call letters are issued. Document Verification: Candidates must produce up-to-date Experience Certificates clearly stating nature of duties
and qualification proofs. Interview: Candidates discuss their anticipated compensation (within the advertised range) along with previous employer compensation details before the interview
which is considered by the Selection Committee. Final Selection: The RBI Services Board's decision on eligibility
and interview results is final and binding
how_to_apply: Candidates can apply for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 only through the official website www.rbi.org.in between 29 June 2026 and 20 July 2026. The process requires registration, document upload, a live photograph capture, and online fee payment before final submission.
Visit www.rbi.org.in, go to Opportunities@RBI > Current Vacancies > Vacancies, and select "Lateral Recruitment of Site Engineers on Full-Time Contract Basis in RBI."
Click "Online Application Form" and select "Click here for New Registration"; enter your name, contact details, and email ID to generate a Provisional Registration Number and Password.
Log in and fill in personal, educational, and experience details, using "Save and Next" to verify entries before final submission.
Upload your scanned photograph (20-50KB, JPG), signature (10-20KB, JPG), left thumb impression, and handwritten declaration as per the prescribed specifications.
Capture and upload a live photograph using a webcam or mobile phone QR scan during registration.
Upload supporting PDF documents (20KB-500KB each) for age, category, educational qualification, and work experience proof.
Click "Complete Registration" only after verifying all details, since no changes are allowed afterward.
Proceed to the "Payment" tab and pay the applicable fee via debit card, credit card, net banking, IMPS, or mobile wallet, then click "Submit."

Candidates should submit only one application per post; in case of multiple submissions, only the last completed application with the higher Registration ID (RID) will be considered, and fees paid against one RID cannot be adjusted to another.

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 Quick Overview
content_sections.text: This section gives candidates the essential facts about RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 at a glance. It covers the organization, total vacancies, application mode, and closing date. Use this overview before checking the detailed eligibility and salary sections below.

rows.information: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Services Board
Consultant Site Engineer (Civil) Level 2 & 3, Consultant Site Engineer (Electrical) Level 3

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about the RBI Site Engineer 2026 application timeline can note that the online registration window opens on 29 June 2026 and stays open until 20 July 2026, 6:00 PM. Eligibility for age and qualification is reckoned as on 01 June 2026, while candidates can print their fee receipt until 04 August 2026.

rows.event: Application Form Print Facility Available Till

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: The RBI Site Engineer Vacancy 2026 covers 8 posts under the Premises Department at Central Office, spread across Civil and Electrical disciplines at Level 2 and Level 3. Consultant Site Engineer (Civil) Level 3 has the highest number of openings at 6, while Level 2 Civil and Electrical Level 3 have 1 vacancy each. Candidates should check the post-wise reservation and job location before applying. There are no reserved seats for EWS, SC, ST, or PwBD candidates in this notification, though PwBD candidates can still apply against identified categories with age relaxation, subject to functional suitability for the post.

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Eligibility for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 is reckoned as on 01 June 2026 and includes nationality, age, educational qualification, and work experience requirements specific to each post. All three posts require a B.Tech (or equivalent) in the relevant stream along with extensive government-sector construction experience. A Master of Technology (M.Tech) in the relevant discipline is desirable but not mandatory for any of the three posts. Experience gained in State PWDs, State PSUs, or State government organizations is also counted as "Similar Government Organisations" experience. The age limit for all three Site Engineer posts is a minimum of 40 years and a maximum of 65 years as on 01 June 2026. Candidates should note that no age relaxation is available for any category in this recruitment, including SC, ST, OBC, or EWS candidates.

rows.essential_qualification: B.Tech or equivalent in Civil stream
rows.essential_work_experience: Min. 15 years in construction & project management of buildings, incl. 5 years in CPWD/CPSU/similar govt. org. not below Assistant Executive Engineer rank

rows.essential_qualification: B.Tech or equivalent in Civil stream
rows.essential_work_experience: Min. 15 years in construction & project management, incl. 5 years in CPWD/CPSU/similar govt. org. not below Executive Engineer rank

rows.essential_qualification: B.Tech or equivalent in Electrical stream
rows.essential_work_experience: Min. 15 years in construction & project management (electrical works), incl. 5 years in CPWD/CPSU/similar govt. org. not below Executive Engineer rank

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 varies by category, with SC/ST/PwBD candidates paying a lower intimation charge compared to General, OBC, and EWS candidates. RBI staff candidates meeting specific eligibility criteria are exempted from the fee entirely. Bank and transaction charges are borne separately by the candidate, and the fee can be paid online via debit card, credit card, internet banking, IMPS, or mobile wallets. Once paid, the application fee is non-refundable under any circumstances and cannot be carried forward to a future selection process.

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about the RBI Site Engineer selection process can note that there is no written exam for this recruitment. Selection happens through preliminary screening by a Screening Committee, followed by document verification and a personal interview. Screening & Shortlisting: The Screening Committee may enhance minimum qualification or experience criteria to limit the number of candidates called, in proportion to the number of vacancies. Merely meeting minimum eligibility does not guarantee an interview call. Interview Call Letter: Shortlisted candidates receive their call letter only via email from [email protected] — no postal call letters are issued. Document Verification: Candidates must produce up-to-date Experience Certificates clearly stating nature of duties, dates, duration, level/position, and responsibilities, along with category, age, and qualification proofs. Interview: Candidates discuss their anticipated compensation (within the advertised range) along with previous employer compensation details before the interview, which is considered by the Selection Committee. Final Selection: The RBI Services Board's decision on eligibility, shortlisting, and interview results is final and binding, with no further correspondence entertained.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 (Apply Online)
content_sections.text: Candidates can apply for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 only through the official website www.rbi.org.in between 29 June 2026 and 20 July 2026. The process requires registration, document upload, a live photograph capture, and online fee payment before final submission. Visit www.rbi.org.in, go to Opportunities@RBI > Current Vacancies > Vacancies, and select "Lateral Recruitment of Site Engineers on Full-Time Contract Basis in RBI." Click "Online Application Form" and select "Click here for New Registration"; enter your name, contact details, and email ID to generate a Provisional Registration Number and Password. Log in and fill in personal, educational, and experience details, using "Save and Next" to verify entries before final submission. Upload your scanned photograph (20-50KB, JPG), signature (10-20KB, JPG), left thumb impression, and handwritten declaration as per the prescribed specifications. Capture and upload a live photograph using a webcam or mobile phone QR scan during registration. Upload supporting PDF documents (20KB-500KB each) for age, category, educational qualification, and work experience proof. Click "Complete Registration" only after verifying all details, since no changes are allowed afterward. Proceed to the "Payment" tab and pay the applicable fee via debit card, credit card, net banking, IMPS, or mobile wallet, then click "Submit." Candidates should submit only one application per post; in case of multiple submissions, only the last completed application with the higher Registration ID (RID) will be considered, and fees paid against one RID cannot be adjusted to another.

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Salary and Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates under RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 receive a monthly consolidated compensation based on their post level, along with housing allowance applicable at the centre of posting. The Selection Committee can offer a higher starting amount within a defined range based on the candidate's qualification, experience, and skill set. The monthly compensation, excluding housing allowance, increases by 7% on successful completion of every 12 months during the contract period, including any extension. This compensation is subject to applicable tax deduction at source, and contract appointees are not eligible for superannuation, separation benefits, or any other allowance or medical benefit beyond what is specified. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Contract Terms 2026
content_sections.text: The RBI Site Engineer posts are offered on a full-time contract basis with an initial tenure of three years, extendable by mutual agreement for up to two more years based on performance. Candidates should understand these terms clearly before applying, since the role differs significantly from a regular RBI employment position.

rows.details: 3 years, extendable up to 2 more years
30 days per calendar year, credited half-yearly
TA/HA/hotel/hired car as per equivalent grade for domestic tours
Not permitted; candidates must resign from current employer

content_sections.heading: RBI Site Engineer Document Requirements 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 must upload several documents in PDF format during the online application process, with each clearly supporting their claims for age, category, qualification, and experience. Missing or unclear documents can lead to rejection at the verification stage. Proof of age (PDF format) Category certificate for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/EWS, where applicable, dated on or before the closing date Educational qualification documents (B.Tech/M.Tech certificates and mark sheets) Up-to-date Experience Certificate clearly stating nature of duties, dates, duration, level/position, and responsibilities Scanned photograph (4.5cm x 3.5cm, 20-50KB, JPG/JPEG) Scanned signature in black ink (10-20KB, JPG/JPEG) Left thumb impression (20-50KB) and handwritten declaration in English (50-100KB) Live photograph captured via webcam or mobile during registration OBC candidates must specifically produce a Non-Creamy Layer certificate based on income for FY 2023-24, 2024-25, or 2025-26, issued on or after 01 April 2026 but before the closing date of 20 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying for RBI Site Engineer 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates risk rejection due to avoidable errors during the RBI Site Engineer online application process. Reviewing these common mistakes beforehand can help ensure your application is processed without issues. Writing the declaration in capital letters or another language: The handwritten declaration must be in English, in the candidate's own handwriting, and not in capital letters — non-compliant declarations make the application invalid. Expecting age relaxation: Unlike many government recruitments, RBI has explicitly stated no age relaxation is available for any category in this notification, so candidates must meet the 40-65 year window strictly. Submitting multiple incomplete applications: If multiple applications are filed for the same post, only the last completed one with the higher Registration ID is considered, and the fee from the earlier RID is not adjusted. Uploading documents in the wrong format: Photograph and signature must be JPG/JPEG, while all other supporting documents must be in PDF format within the specified size limits. Not informing current employer: Government/PSU employees must submit an undertaking confirming they have informed their employer in writing about applying, or their candidature may be rejected. Ignoring OBC NCL certificate dating: OBC candidates need a Non-Creamy Layer certificate issued on or after 01 April 2026 — older certificates based on different financial years won't be accepted.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 July 2026, till 6:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 8 total vacancies across three posts: Consultant Site Engineer (Civil) Level 2, Consultant Site Engineer (Civil) Level 3, and Consultant Site Engineer (Electrical) Level 3.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for RBI Site Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all three posts is minimum 40 years and maximum 65 years as on 01 June 2026, and no age relaxation is available for any category.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: SC/ST/PwBD candidates pay ₹100 plus GST as intimation charges, while General/OBC/EWS candidates pay ₹600 plus GST; RBI staff candidates meeting eligibility criteria are exempted.

faq.question: Q5. Is there a written exam for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no written test. Selection is through screening/shortlisting, document verification, and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for RBI Consultant Site Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Level 2 candidates receive ₹2,40,000 per month (negotiable up to ₹3,40,000) and Level 3 candidates receive ₹3,10,000 per month (negotiable up to ₹4,10,000), plus housing allowance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the work experience required for RBI Site Engineer 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum of 15 years' experience in construction and project management of buildings, including at least 5 years in CPWD, CPSU, or similar government organizations at a specified minimum rank.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of the RBI Site Engineer contract?
faq.answer: The initial contract tenure is three years, extendable by mutual agreement for up to two more years based on the appointee's performance.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for RBI Site Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 July 2026, till 6:00 PM.
